briefdescription.para: Create and fill common HDF5 groups and datasets.

parameterdescription.para: HDF5 identifier
[optional, see ToplevelInfo() for defaults] datasets directly below /
[optional, see GeneralInfo() for defaults] datasets directly below /general
[optional, see SubjectInfo() for defaults] datasets below /general/subject

briefdescription.para: Create the HDF5 group for intracellular ephys.

parameterdescription.para: HDF5 identifier
[optional, defaults to PLACEHOLDER] filtering information

memberdef.argsstring: (variable locationID, string name, variable version, string description)
memberdef.name: AddDevice

briefdescription.para: Add an entry for the device name in the nwb file specified by locationID.

parameterdescription.para: HDF5 identifier
name of device to create
major NWB version
a string describing the created device

simplesect.para: 1 if a new device was created and 0 if it already existed

memberdef.argsstring: (variable locationID, string name, variable version, string data, string device)
memberdef.name: AddElectrode

briefdescription.para: Add an entry for the electrode name with contents data
Add a modification timestamp to the NWB file.

detaileddescription.para: According to the NWB spec everything not required should be specifically marked. In NWBv2, schema extensions can be used to accomplish this.

parameterdescription.para: HDF5 identifier
dataset or group name

memberdef.argsstring: (variable locationID, string fullAbsPath, string unitWithPrefix, variable resolution=defaultValue, variable overwrite=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: AddTimeSeriesUnitAndRes

briefdescription.para: Add unit and resolution to TimeSeries dataset.

parameterdescription.para: HDF5 identifier
absolute path to the TimeSeries dataset
unit with optional prefix of the data in the TimeSeries,
[optional, defaults to NaN for unknown] experimental resolution
[optional, defaults to false] should existing attributes be overwritten

memberdef.argsstring: (TimeSeriesProperties *tsp, string nwbProp, variable value, string unit=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: AddProperty

briefdescription.para: Add a TimeSeries property to the tsp structure.
Add a custom TimeSeries property to the names and data waves.
Return the next free group index of the format data_$NUM

memberdef.argsstring: (variable locationID, string path, variable version, WriteChannelParams *p, TimeSeriesProperties *tsp, variable compressionMode=defaultValue, string nwbFilePath=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: WriteSingleChannel

briefdescription.para: Write the data of a single channel to the NWB file.

parameterdescription.para: HDF5 file identifier
Absolute path in the HDF5 file where the data should be stored
major NWB version
Filled WriteChannelParams structure
Filled TimeSeriesProperties structure
[optional, defaults to NO_COMPRESSION] Type of compression to use, one of CompressionMode
[optional, required only for epoch writing] disc location of the NWB file

simplesect.para: locationID, this is different from the parameter if epoch information was written

memberdef.argsstring: (string nwbFilePath, WaveText epochs, string timeseries, variable startingTime, variable samplingRate)
memberdef.name: WriteEpochs

memberdef.argsstring: (string nwbFilePath, variable startTime, variable stopTime, WaveText tags, WaveText timeseries, wave startingTime, wave rate, variable treelevel)
memberdef.name: AppendToEpochTable

briefdescription.para: Append an epoch to the TimeIntervals table.

parameterdescription.para: HDF5 file path (required for writing the timeseries compound using a custom XOP)
start time of the epoch in seconds in the global time coordinate system (included in the range)
stop time of the epoch in seconds in the global time coordinate system (not included in the range)
text wave with strings for the epoch, format is unspecified
absolute paths to existing timeseries groups
timeseries starting time in s according to NWBv2 spec
timeseries rate in Hz according to NWBv2 spec
Tree level of the epoch

briefdescription.para: Create a Dynamic Table group at path.

detaileddescription.para: Note: A dynamic table needs at least an id and a vectorData column

simplesect.para: NaN if the group already exists, 1 otherwise

briefdescription.para: Append a sweep to the sweep table.

parameterdescription.para: HDF5 identifier
path to dataset where sweep is stored
sweep number

briefdescription.para: write NWB:N specifications that were used for creating this file

detaileddescription.para: Note: non threadsafe due to limitations in LoadSpecification

parameterdescription.para: open HDF5 file identifier

memberdef.argsstring: (variable locationID, string spec_name, string spec_version, string spec_location, string spec_start, string spec_include)
memberdef.name: WriteSpecification

briefdescription.para: write a specifications group to NWB_SPECIFICATIONS and link its location in .specloc

parameterdescription.para: open HDF5 file identifier
name of namespace, e.g. "core"
version of added namespace as string
Igor File Path to location of *.json files in IPNWB repository
namespace.json declaration file
";" separated list of include files for defining extensions within the namespace
HDF5 identifier
Path to element who's DataType is queried
String version of the data type that should get written

briefdescription.para: Determine the ancestry tree for the specified neurodata type definition.

parameterdescription.para: A list of all previously ancester dataTypes

simplesect.para: a specified neurodata type definition string json

briefdescription.para: Generic functions related to export into the NeuroDataWithoutBorders format.
